notes: convex-local-backend reports '/version' as 'local_backend unknown' — the binary has no embedded semver, so this checksum pin is the authoritative version identity per docs/operations/self-hosted-convex.md. Recorded from the archive already installed on the primary dev machine (downloaded as 'latest' on 2026-07-19); no upstream release tag was independently re-verified against this checksum. Update both hashes and pinnedAt together whenever the backend is intentionally upgraded, after re-vetting the new archive.
